description: 中枢路由：IRC ↔ WS 双向翻译 + 命令分派。forward_inbound_ws 处理 bridge→IRC，forward_inbound_irc 处理 IRC→bridges+plugins。V4 简化：移除 _handle_explicit_command。

classes.name: Router
classes.description: 核心路由类。WS 入站消息按 type 分派（message/event），message 按 content '/' 前缀检测 plugin 命令，否则路由到 IRC。IRC 入站解析 irc_encoding 后广播到 WS bridges。

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature: (self, routing: RoutingTable, registry: PluginRegistry, irc_conn: Any, ws_server: Any) -> None

methods.name: forward_inbound_ws
methods.description: 处理从 bridge 来的 WS 消息，按 type 分派（message 或 event）

methods.name: _handle_message
methods.description: 处理 content 消息：'/' 前缀命令分派或路由到 IRC

methods.name: _route_to_irc
methods.signature: (self, channel: str, content: str, msg: dict) -> None
methods.description: 根据 mode 决定 @ prefix，发 IRC PRIVMSG

methods.name: _query_mode
methods.description: 通过 mode plugin 查当前 mode

methods.name: forward_inbound_irc
methods.signature: (self, irc_channel: str, nick: str, body: str) -> None
methods.description: IRC pubmsg → WS broadcast + plugin 订阅 + 命令分派

methods.name: emit_event
methods.signature: (self, channel: str, event: str, data: dict | None = None) -> None
methods.description: core/plugin 发 event 的统一出口
